Home/International Removals/Germany
The Move

Germany is one of our most established European routes, served by road all year round.

From Berlin to Munich, British movers and returning professionals head for Germany every year, and we look after a good number of them. Dedicated vehicles run regularly, so your belongings travel with crews who make the journey often.

Road freight keeps a German move quick and flexible. A dedicated load gives you the fastest door to door service, while a part load shares vehicle space and splits the cost.

Popular destinations we deliver to
BerlinMunichFrankfurtHamburgCologneStuttgart
Typical Transit Times
Dedicated road service3–5 days
Part-load (groupage)1–2 weeks
Times shown are door to door. Please allow a little extra for customs formalities. We recommend booking 6 to 8 weeks ahead of your move date.
Your options

Choose the right way to move

Every move to Germany is different, so we shape the service around yours.

Road · Dedicated

A vehicle reserved for your move

One crew loads at your door in the UK and the same crew delivers a few days later. Nothing is transhipped and nothing waits in a depot.

Best for: full households, fixed dates
Road · Part-load

Share the vehicle, share the cost

Your goods travel alongside other moves on a scheduled departure. A little more patience, a noticeably smaller bill.

Best for: smaller moves, flexible budgets
Nationwide Coverage

Delivered across all sixteen states

From the northern ports to the Bavarian Alps, our network reaches every corner of Germany on a regular schedule.

Best for: moves anywhere in Germany
Excess Baggage

A few boxes or suitcases

Not moving a whole household? Our excess baggage service is a simple, affordable way to send personal items and smaller consignments overseas.

Best for: light movers & students
Good to know

Moving to Germany now takes paperwork, and we handle it

UK households entering Germany pass through customs, and the right documents make all the difference. We prepare everything with you well before moving day, so your belongings keep moving.

Customs declarations

Your shipment travels with a full inventory and the declarations German customs expect.

Anmeldung & residency

Registering your new address, the Anmeldung, is often needed to support duty relief.

Duty relief on household goods

Used personal effects usually enter free of duty when you transfer your main residence to Germany.

Residency evidence

Proof of your move, such as a visa or registration certificate, supports the relief claim.
